subcategory: commercial free judgment portal + legal articles

notes: Alive and active July 2026. Free to view without registration; optional lawyer subscription. Hebrew only. Terms of use + privacy policy linked in footer (details not fetched).

subcategory: free bulk judgment aggregator

notes: Alive, content-rich, explicitly free ('המאגר המשפטי הטוב בישראל ובחינם'). Claims 4M+ documents. Not a parked domain. Sister-style sites: verdicts.co.il, myjudgments.com.

subcategory: commercial legal database with free judgment preview pages
